parameters.query: UPDATE payments SET status = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.status }}' = '' THEN status ELSE '{{ $json.status }}' END, paid_at = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.paid_at }}' = '' THEN paid_at ELSE '{{ $json.paid_at }}'::timestamptz END, raw_omise = '{{ $json.raw }}'::jsonb WHERE charge_id = '{{ $json.charge_id }}' RETURNING charge_id, status, paid_at;
